files.patch:
@@ -531,1 +531,1 @@
-#if !(defined(_LP64) && (defined(LINUX) || defined(__APPLE__) || defined(_WINDOWS)))
+#if !(defined(_LP64) && (defined(LINUX) || defined(_WINDOWS) || defined(_ALLBSD_SOURCE)))
@@ -533,1 +533,1 @@
-  // (3) MacOSX/64-bit and (4) Windowss/64-bit
+  // (3) MacOSX/64-bit and (4) Windowss/64-bit and (5) BSD/64-bit

@@ -178,0 +178,4 @@
+  // Enable WXWrite: the function is called directly from nmethod_entry_barrier
+  // stub.
+  BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXWrite, Thread::current()));
+

@@ -54,1 +54,1 @@
-  MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXWrite, Thread::current());)
+  BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXWrite, Thread::current());)

@@ -174,1 +174,1 @@
-  MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, thread));       \
+  BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, thread));         \

@@ -103,1 +103,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, thr));               \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, thr));                 \

@@ -439,1 +439,1 @@
-    <xsl:text>MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, current_thread));</xsl:text>
+    <xsl:text>BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable __wx(WXWrite, current_thread));</xsl:text>

@@ -2553,1 +2553,1 @@
-#ifdef LINUX
+#if defined(LINUX) || defined(_BSDONLY_SOURCE)

@@ -286,1 +286,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \
@@ -317,1 +317,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \
@@ -329,1 +329,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \
@@ -370,1 +370,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \
@@ -398,1 +398,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \
@@ -411,1 +411,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(                                              \
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(                                                \

@@ -143,1 +143,1 @@
-#ifdef MACOS_AARCH64
+#if BSD_AARCH64
@@ -151,1 +151,1 @@
-#endif // MACOS_AARCH64
+#endif // BSD_AARCH64
@@ -640,1 +640,1 @@
-#if defined(_WINDOWS) || defined(BSD)
+#if defined(_WINDOWS) || (defined(BSD) && !defined(__OpenBSD__))

@@ -31,1 +31,1 @@
-#if defined(LINUX) || defined(AIX)
+#if defined(LINUX) || defined(AIX) || defined(_BSDONLY_SOURCE)

@@ -343,1 +343,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXExec, Thread::current());) // About to call into code cache
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXExec, Thread::current());) // About to call into code cache
@@ -349,1 +349,1 @@
-    MACOS_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXExec, Thread::current());) // About to call into code cache
+    BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(ThreadWXEnable wx(WXExec, Thread::current());) // About to call into code cache

@@ -77,0 +77,6 @@
+#if defined(LINUX) || defined(_BSDONLY_SOURCE)
+#define NOT_NOEXECSTACK(code)
+#else
+#define NOT_NOEXECSTACK(code) code
+#endif
+
@@ -201,1 +207,1 @@
-  static bool specifies_noexecstack(const char* filepath) NOT_LINUX({ return false; });
+  static bool specifies_noexecstack(const char* filepath) NOT_NOEXECSTACK({ return false; });

@@ -82,1 +82,1 @@
-#if defined(_LP64) && defined(__APPLE__)
+#if defined(_LP64) && defined(_ALLBSD_SOURCE)
@@ -85,1 +85,1 @@
-#endif // _LP64 && __APPLE__
+#endif // _LP64 && _ALLBSD_SOURCE

@@ -555,0 +555,5 @@
+#define BSD_AARCH64_ONLY(x) BSD_ONLY(AARCH64_ONLY(x))
+#if defined(BSD) && defined(AARCH64)
+#define BSD_AARCH64 1
+#endif
+

@@ -38,1 +38,1 @@
-#if (defined(_NMT_NOINLINE_) || defined(_WINDOWS) || !defined(_LP64) || defined(PPC64) || (defined(BSD) && defined (__aarch64__)))
+#if (defined(_NMT_NOINLINE_) || defined(_WINDOWS) || !defined(_LP64) || defined(PPC64) || (defined(__APPLE__) && defined (__aarch64__)))
